meta.title: Create a New Post — Daily Page
meta.description: Start a fresh creative post with optional tags, language, and visibility.

placeholder.full: e.g. 'My Masterpiece', 'The Best Idea Ever', 'Clickbait for Nerds'

description.label: Description (optional):
description.placeholder: Explain your brilliance… or just wing it.

bannerImage.help: Use an externally hosted image. It will appear above the post and on spacious post cards.

initialContent.label: Initial Content (optional):
initialContent.help: Start writing here or press “Create” to continue on the full editor page, where you can embed images and collaborate in real time.
initialContent.placeholder: Start your post here, or continue editing after creation…

public.label: Public
public.title: Editable by anyone in real-time. No login needed.
public.inline: Editable by anyone in real-time. No login needed.

unlisted.label: Unlisted Draft
unlisted.title: Hidden from public browsing while editable. Visible after locking.
unlisted.inline: Hidden from public browsing while editable. Visible after locking.
unlisted.tooltip: Unlisted drafts are hidden from public browsing while editable. Anyone with the link can collaborate, and the post becomes public when locked.

translate.label: Translate existing post (URL or ID):
translate.placeholder: Paste a post URL or ID (optional)
translate.invalid: That doesn’t look like a valid post URL or ID.

messages.langExists: A translation for that language already exists. Please pick another language.
messages.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
